overallSummary: Fabio Giglietto maintains a highly focused and academically prestigious social media presence across LinkedIn, Bluesky, and Mastodon. His posts, which center on computational social science, coordinated inauthentic behavior, and academic hiring, command remarkably high engagement rates relative to his follower base. While LinkedIn hosts his largest audience, Bluesky provides the highest relative engagement and shareability.

contentThemes.description: Research announcements, methodology, and software tools like CooRnet aimed at identifying coordinated link-sharing campaigns.
Hiring announcements for postdocs and PhD opportunities in computational social science.
Celebrating significant achievements such as grants awarded and peer-reviewed paper publications.

recommendations: Cross-promote software updates like CooRnet on Bluesky to leverage its highly active repost culture.
Add direct links and engaging rich media to LinkedIn hiring posts to maximize CTR and application volume.
Engage more deeply with Mastodon's decentralized academic networks by initiating method-focused discussions.

platformInsights.bluesky: Boasts the highest average engagement rate (6.1%) and excellent virality, especially for research opportunities and paper publications.
platformInsights.mastodon: Provides a dedicated academic community that engages steadily with technical updates, though with lower overall reach.
platformInsights.linkedin: Serves as the main hub for professional milestones and career opportunities, garnering the highest absolute volume of likes and comments.

topPerformingContent.content: Just published our new paper on coordinated inauthentic behavior on social media platforms!
New research opportunity for PhD students interested in computational social science. Reply for details!
Excited to announce that our research team has been awarded a new grant to study information operations across social media platforms.
